response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, experienced engineer, but his profile fundamentally mismatches this role. The position mandates 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows plus SQL Server/Oracle and fixed-income or capital-markets domain expertise; his professional C++ exposure amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015, his career since has centered on TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, his databases are MySQL/MongoDB, and his only finance-adjacent work (RIDE Capital) was a Node.js fintech startup, not capital markets or fixed income.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience with strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Low-latency systems experience (DLang microservices handling millions of requests/second) suggests solid performance fundamentals
CI/CD, DevOps tooling, and some Java exposure match several desirable skills
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience, far short of the mandatory 5-10 years on Windows
No fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No SQL Server or Oracle background; database experience is MySQL and MongoDB

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering fundamentals and CI/CD
